Careers

We always seek talented and passionate people who want to join our company

At CEMWorks we always seek talented and passionate people who want to join our company. Here, we have a friendly environment and a team that is passionate about research work that is applied to real-world electromagnetic simulation problems. We are especially interested in researchers who:

Enjoys computational sciences and high performance computing challenges.
Uses C++ for performance-critical codes.
Understands object-oriented programming principles
Values unit tests and validation.
Likes investigating cutting-edge techniques for computational electromagnetics, numerical linear algebra, etc.
Does not shy away from learning new numerical techniques.

Advanced degrees, experience with parallel programming, commonly used design patterns is very welcome.

Job Post
Email us your CV
Open Positions
C++ Software Developer

Focus: software development for computational physics.

The ideal candidate for this position is interested in efficient C++ implementations of challenging algorithms, as well as the best practices for the design of modular, testable, and extendible software architecture.
